items.title: EOULSURE official website renewal
items.summary: The team homepage was renewed with sponsor, news, and contact sections.
items.detail: EOULSURE is building a more official digital presence to introduce the team, organize partner information, and share updates about vehicle development, events, and collaborations.

items.title: Selected as Z by HP Workstation Master Ambassador
items.summary: EOULSURE was selected for a workstation ambassador program supporting student engineering work.
items.detail: Through the program, the team continues to expand its design and engineering capabilities across CAD, simulation, documentation, and vehicle development workflows.

items.title: Industry expert lecture series
items.summary: EOULSURE hosted lectures with experts from Formula 1 and aerospace engineering.
items.detail: The team hosted lectures with Dr. Namho Kim, the first Korean F1 engineer, and Beomjun Kim, a KAI KF-21 wing and empennage design engineer, connecting students with real engineering experience.

items.title: Moved into KU PI-ville 99
items.summary: The team joined Korea University's Crimson Startup Support Foundation program.
items.detail: By joining PI-ville 99, EOULSURE strengthened its project infrastructure and expanded its activities beyond vehicle manufacturing into entrepreneurship and public outreach.

items.title: EOULSURE e was founded
items.summary: The team expanded into education, outreach, and mobility culture activities.
items.detail: EOULSURE established its entrepreneurship club, EOULSURE e, to go beyond car building and share automotive engineering and motorsports culture with a wider audience.
